orphan_routes.detail: All routes in App.tsx have valid component files via lazy imports.

orphan_pages.detail: All page components referenced by lazy imports in App.tsx appear valid.

items.issue: Exists locally but never deployed. Not invoked from src/ or other edge functions.

orphan_edge_functions.detail: Most edge functions are invoked by other edge functions, webhooks, cron, or external triggers. Only send-welcome-email appears truly orphaned.

db_tables_not_in_code.detail: Tables accessed only by edge functions, RLS policies, or triggers are expected to have no src/ references. Playbook tables and vendor/marketplace/enterprise tables with 0 rows are either used by edge functions or awaiting future features. No action required.

phantom_tables.detail: 61 tables referenced in code (supabase.from() calls) that do not exist in the production database. These will produce runtime RLS or 404 errors.
notes: 'x' is likely a typo or test artifact.
'profiles' should be 'user_profiles' — wrong table name in code.
'referrals' is a HoodOps PRO table and must NOT be created in this repo.

missing_env_docs.detail: No .env.example file exists. All environment variables are undocumented. New developers have no reference for required configuration.

role_mismatch.detail: Code roles match DB roles. Code defines 8 roles (platform_admin, owner_operator, executive, compliance_manager, chef, kitchen_manager, facilities_manager, kitchen_staff). Aliases 'admin' and 'owner' map to owner_operator.

jie_baseline.detail: JIE baseline verified. Note: audit spec referenced column 'state_code' but actual column is 'state'. Schema documentation mismatch logged.

items.verdict: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — purpose unclear, may violate zero-fake-data rule

fake_data_candidates.detail: 5 of 6 candidates are properly gated by isDemoMode. sampleData.ts requires manual review.

deployed_only_functions.detail: 52 edge functions exist on the Supabase server but have no local source code in the repository. This includes critical cron-invoked functions. Local development, review, and disaster recovery are impossible for these functions.

rls_disabled_tables.detail: 7 tables have RLS disabled. Data is publicly readable without row-level security. If any contain sensitive or org-scoped data, this is a security vulnerability.
